name: astrid
description: Run Claude Code as a governed Astrid agent: capsule tools over MCP, an ephemeral self-cleaning daemon, a SessionStart readiness doctor, an Astrid HUD status line, /astrid:* operator commands, and an Astrid-agent identity. Installing this plugin turns a vanilla `claude` REPL into an Astrid-integrated session.

principal.title: Astrid principal
principal.description: The Astrid principal this Claude Code session acts as. Scopes tool execution, capability checks, and audit to this identity. Defaults to 'claude-code' — a least-authority agent in the 'claude' family group (self-scoped only, NOT the admin 'default'), auto-provisioned on first launch. Set to 'default' to run with admin authority, or any name to run as that scoped agent. Run `astrid agent list` to see principals.
